request_payload.exposure_text: I get why people worry about alliance commitments, but let's be real - our partners aren't pulling their weight. We're carrying the burden while others free-ride. That's not security, that's exploitation. Time to demand fair burden-sharing or go our own way. #NationalSecurityFirst
